description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, painted in a camouflage pattern with Soviet red star insignias on the wings and tail. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, giving the airplane a distinctive delta-like profile. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the jet engine exhaust visible at the rear. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel, all of which appear retractable. The overall design suggests a high-speed, maneuverable aircraft intended for combat or reconnaissance roles.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept-back wings, red star insignias, and a pointed nose, featuring a single vertical tail and enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with visible underwing stores.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and visible landing gear beneath the aircraft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single jet exhaust, vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing camouflage details, wing configuration, and the position of the cockpit and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
